scene_summary: A minimal tabletop plate of layered paper: a cobalt envelope collision cuts the lower field, a cream torn slab crosses it, and a glossy black print aperture throws a moon-like glare. Pastel envelopes and tiny punctures sit as marginal source-bearing anchors in the negative paper field.
usable_surfaces: pastel envelope flaps at upper edges
thin center scratch and punched paper holes
orange-rust underside edge along bottom seam

detected_objects.label: hero cobalt envelope collision
detected_objects.visual_evidence: dominant cobalt folded envelope with a sharp diagonal flap, dark slit, torn pinhole and hard paper edges occupying the lower-left plate

detected_objects.label: hero cream cafe receipt slab
detected_objects.visual_evidence: large warm cream paper plane with scalloped torn upper edge, vertical crease, deckled bottom edge and a small puncture near lower right

detected_objects.label: glossy moon-print aperture
detected_objects.visual_evidence: black glossy photo aperture partly occluded by the cream slab, with a bright white glare bloom and dust speckles across the dark print

detected_objects.label: pastel envelope seal cluster
detected_objects.visual_evidence: mauve pastel envelope at the top edge with a folded triangular flap and central crease forming a small archived-paper interruption

detected_objects.label: pool-blue tuner sticker
detected_objects.visual_evidence: pale blue paper strip/envelope edge in the upper-right corner, sunlit and band-like, reading as a tucked blue source strip despite no legible ticks

detected_objects.label: pool glare thumbnail
detected_objects.visual_evidence: concentrated white glare bloom with radial dust grains on the glossy black print, a small media-grain target distinct from the larger aperture

detected_objects.label: rust recursive loop cut
detected_objects.visual_evidence: orange-rust underside exposed beneath the cobalt and cream papers along the lower edge, forming a cut-through seam and portal-like edge rupture

detected_objects.label: rust recursive loop cut
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: index stamp interruption
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is sparse and expressionist: a few large paper planes dominate, with isolated punctures, scratches, glare, and seams acting as readable anchors. Negative cream space remains open, so the source windows are not visually cluttered.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
